author: ShadyTidus
description: Community Wiki Helper with slash command support: server rules, hosting guidelines, colors/levels info, channel access help, and content promotion guidance. From ShadyCogs collection.
install_msg: Thanks for installing the Wiki Cog from ShadyCogs! Use `[p]wikiset` to configure authorized roles. Slash commands: `/rule`, `/host`, `/hosted`, `/colors`, `/noaccess`, `/promote`.
name: wiki
short: Wiki helper with rules and server info commands.
